Class AppController

java.lang.Object
controller.AppController
public class AppController extends Object
The central controller for the ToDo Master application.

This class manages the primary JFrame window and orchestrates the interaction between the Workspace and Checklist pages. It also handles application lifecycle behavior, such as saving data on close.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description

    Constructs a new AppController to control the provided workspace.

  • Constructor Details

    • AppController

      public AppController(Workspace data)
      Constructs a new AppController to control the provided workspace.

      Sets up the main application window, links page controllers, and prepares the workspace and checklist pages for use. Also adds a listener to save data on close.

      Parameters:
      data - the workspace to manage

  • Method Details

    • registerPage

      public void registerPage(JPanel page)
      Registers the given Panel as a page depending on its concrete type.
      Parameters:
      page - the page to register

    • showWorkspacePage

      public void showWorkspacePage()
      Displays the workspace page in the main window and updates its contents.

    • showChecklistPage

      public void showChecklistPage(Checklist checklist)
      Displays the checklist page in the main window and updates its contents.
      Parameters:
      checklist - the checklist to show

    • getWindow

      public JFrame getWindow()
      Returns the main application JFrame window.

    • getWorkspace

      public Workspace getWorkspace()
      Returns the Workspace data observed by the Workspace Page.
